title: asplenium supra-auritum
intro: Asplenium supra-auritum, also known as the Chinese bird's nest fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asplenium supra-auritum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. As a medicinal herb, Asplenium supra-auritum can be prepared through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
